name: Red-Eyes Fang with Chain
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>鎖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>くさり</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>付</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>つ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>き<ruby lang="jp"><rb>真紅眼牙</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>レッドアイズファング</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Target 1 "Red-Eyes" monster you control; equip this card to it. It can make up to 2 attacks on monsters during each Battle Phase. You can send this Equip Card to the GY, then target 1 Effect Monster on the field; equip that target to the monster this card was equipped to, and if you do, while a monster is equipped to it by this effect, its ATK/DEF become equal to the original ATK/DEF of that equipped monster.
eff: Target 1 "Red-Eyes" monster you control; equip this card to it. It can make up to 2 attacks on monsters during each Battle Phase. You can send this Equip Card to the GY, then target 1 Effect Monster on the field; equip that target to the monster this card was equipped to, and if you do, while a monster is equipped to it by this effect, its ATK/DEF become equal to the original ATK/DEF of that equipped monster.

action: Sends itself from field to Graveyard for cost
